sentences.target: Meine Tante ist Krankenschwester in Berlin.

translations.de: Meine Tante ist Krankenschwester in Berlin.
translations.en: My aunt is a nurse in Berlin.
translations.es: Mi tía es enfermera en Berlín.
translations.fr: Ma tante est infirmière à Berlin.
translations.it: Mia zia è infermiera a Berlino.
translations.ru: Моя тётя работает медсестрой в Берлине.
translations.pt: Minha tia é enfermeira em Berlim.
translations.vi: Dì tôi là y tá ở Berlin.
translations.nl: Mijn tante is verpleegkundige in Berlijn.
translations.uk: Моя тітка працює медсестрою в Берліні.
translations.hi: मेरी मौसी बर्लिन में नर्स है।
translations.pl: Moja ciocia jest pielęgniarką w Berlinie.
translations.el: Η θεία μου είναι νοσηλεύτρια στο Βερολίνο.
translations.nb: Tanten min er sykepleier i Berlin.
translations.id: Tante saya adalah perawat di Berlin.
translations.sv: Min moster är sjuksköterska i Berlin.
translations.ro: Mătușa mea este asistentă medicală în Berlin.
translations.cs: Moje teta je zdravotní sestra v Berlíně.
translations.da: Min tante er sygeplejerske i Berlin.
translations.ja: 私の叔母はベルリンで看護師をしています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with feminine singular noun; nominative; marks possession of 'Tante'.
Common noun; subject (nominative), feminine singular.
Copular auxiliary; finite 3rd person singular present linking subject to predicate noun.
Predicate noun (prädikatives Nomen) after copula; nominative, feminine singular.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase (static location; governs dative).
Proper noun; object of the preposition 'in' indicating location.

sentences.target: Die Krankenschwester bringt mir heute die Tabletten.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkʁaŋkənˌʃvɛstɐ bʁɪŋt miːɐ̯ ˈhɔɪ̯tə diː taˈblɛtən/

translations.de: Die Krankenschwester bringt mir heute die Tabletten.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkʁaŋkənˌʃvɛstɐ bʁɪŋt miːɐ̯ ˈhɔɪ̯tə diː taˈblɛtən/
translations.en: The nurse is bringing me the pills today.
translations.es: La enfermera me trae las pastillas hoy.
translations.it: Oggi l'infermiera mi porta le pillole.
translations.pt: A enfermeira vai me trazer os comprimidos hoje.
translations.he: האחות מביאה לי את הכדורים היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay y tá mang thuốc cho tôi.
translations.nl: De verpleegkundige brengt me vandaag de pillen.
translations.hu: Ma az ápolónő hozza nekem a tablettákat.
translations.hi: आज नर्स मुझे गोलियाँ ला रही है।
translations.el: Η νοσηλεύτρια θα μου φέρει τα χάπια σήμερα.
translations.nb: Sykepleieren kommer med tablettene til meg i dag.
translations.id: Perawat itu membawa pil untuk saya hari ini.
translations.sv: Sjuksköterskan kommer med tabletterna till mig i dag.
translations.da: Sygeplejersken kommer med pillerne til mig i dag.
translations.ja: 看護師さんが今日薬を持ってきてくれます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular, marking the subject noun.
Common noun; subject (nominative), feminine singular.
Main verb; finite 3rd person singular present.
Personal pronoun; dative 1st person singular; indirect object/recipient.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.
Definite article; accusative plural marking the direct object.
Common noun; direct object (accusative plural).

translations.en: My sister wants to become a nurse.
translations.ko: 제 여동생은 간호사가 되고 싶어 해요.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi muốn trở thành y tá.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन नर्स बनना चाहती है।
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου θέλει να γίνει νοσηλεύτρια.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya ingin menjadi perawat.
translations.ro: Sora mea vrea să devină asistentă medicală.
translations.cs: Moje sestra chce být zdravotní sestrou.
translations.ja: 私の妹は看護師になりたいです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with feminine singular noun; nominative.
Common noun; subject (nominative), feminine singular.
Modal auxiliary; finite 3rd person singular present selecting an infinitive.
Predicate noun within the infinitival complement; nominative.
Main verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'.

sentences.target: Ich frage die Krankenschwester nach dem Ergebnis.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː ˈkʁaŋkənˌʃvɛstɐ naːx deːm ɛɐ̯ˈɡeːbnɪs/

translations.de: Ich frage die Krankenschwester nach dem Ergebnis.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː ˈkʁaŋkənˌʃvɛstɐ naːx deːm ɛɐ̯ˈɡeːbnɪs/
translations.en: I ask the nurse about the result.
translations.es: Le pregunto a la enfermera sobre el resultado.
translations.fr: Je demande le résultat à l'infirmière.
translations.ru: Я спрашиваю у медсестры о результате.
translations.pt: Pergunto à enfermeira sobre o resultado.
translations.he: אני שואל את האחות על התוצאה.
translations.vi: Tôi hỏi y tá về kết quả.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de verpleegkundige naar de uitslag.
translations.hi: मैं नर्स से नतीजे के बारे में पूछता हूँ।
translations.el: Ρωτάω τη νοσηλεύτρια για το αποτέλεσμα.
translations.id: Saya bertanya kepada perawat tentang hasilnya.
translations.ja: 看護師さんに結果を聞きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; subject (nominative) 1st person singular.
Main verb; finite 1st person singular present.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular marking the direct object.
Common noun; direct object (accusative), feminine singular.
Preposition governing dative; forms a prepositional object with 'dem Ergebnis' ('ask about').
Definite article; dative neuter singular required by 'nach'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'nach' (dative neuter singular).
